description.content:
The SharePoint API is used by the SharePoint admin center
(`https://{tenant}-admin.sharepoint.com`) for tenant bootstrap, storage quota
discovery, site inventory, group creation checks, internal admin list reads,
and settings workflows.

The operations below were confirmed while browsing the SharePoint admin center
with a real authenticated Edge session on pages such as:

  - Home
  - Active sites, including site detail membership and settings tabs
  - Deleted sites
  - Settings
  - Migration
  - More features
  - Advanced management

This surface is the tenant-specific same-origin `/_api/*` layer on the
SharePoint admin host. The portal also generated generic Microsoft 365 shell
traffic to `admin.microsoft.com` and `portal.office.com`, but those routes are
not included here because they are not SharePoint-specific.

Observed POST requests relied on the authenticated SharePoint browser session
together with same-origin headers such as `x-requestdigest`, `SdkVersion`,
`odata-version`, and a SharePoint admin `Referer`.

Documentation and specifications have been provided on a best-efforts basis
and may not be 100% accurate.


Contact Support:
 Name: nodoc
